sections.paragraph:
pret. and imp. Kal, fut. and inf. Hiphil, to lead, Exo 32:34 Num 23:7 Job 38:32 1Sa 22:4 often used of God as governing men, Psa 5:9 27:11 31:4 61:3 73:24 143:10 .

(2) to lead forth (as troops), 1Ki 10:26 2Ki 18:11.

(3) to lead back, Job 12:23, שֹׁטֵחַ לַגֹּויִם וַיַּנְחֵם “he spreads out the nations, and leads them back,” into their former limits, whence they had migrated.
